title: NSFAS Application Drive — Georgetown Library
excerpt: Bring your documents. Volunteers will assist with NSFAS applications.
content: We will be at Georgetown Library helping learners with NSFAS applications. Bring your ID, parents'/guardians' income proof and supporting documents.

title: Financial Literacy Workshop Certificates Issued
excerpt: Congrats to all youth who completed our Avocado Vision program!
content: We celebrated participants who completed the financial literacy course and received certificates.

title: Partnership Announced with LifeLine PMB
excerpt: Collaboration to expand psychosocial support for youth.
content: We are partnering with LifeLine PMB to offer more psychosocial services in schools.

title: In solidarity with Women for Change — End Violence Against Women
excerpt: Empowering Youth goes purple to take a stand against GBV and femicide.
content: In solidarity with Women for Change, Empowering Youth goes purple to take a stand against Gender-Based Violence and Feminicide.

title: Good luck with your final exams
excerpt: Empowering Youth wishes learners the best for their final exams.
content: Empowering Youth wishes you all the best as you begin your final exams. This is your moment — stay focused, believe in yourself, and give it your all.

title: Applications support — reminder
excerpt: Support for applications and forms available.
content: We continue to provide application support for NSFAS, CAO and college/TVET applications. Ask about our drop-in times and application sessions.
